blended.narrative: Bromont is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 24°F.
